description_long: This stool features a geometric, modern design with a square seat and a high, slatted backrest. The frame and legs are constructed from wood, with alternating dark and natural wood tones creating a striking striped pattern along the legs and backrest. The seat surface is flat and broad, finished in a lighter wood grain with fine linear texture. The backrest consists of three vertical slats and two horizontal crossbars, providing both support and visual interest. The legs are straight and sturdy, positioned at the corners for stability. The overall appearance is both functional and decorative, making it suitable for contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern wooden stool with a striped pattern, flat seat, and slatted backrest. The design combines dark and natural wood tones for a bold, geometric look.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the striped backrest with three vertical slats and two horizontal crossbars, and the striped pattern on the legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat, textured seat and the straight, rectangular profile of the legs and backrest.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the broad seat, striped legs, and the open, slatted backrest design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same flat seat and straight leg profile, with the backrest visible in profile.
